reviews.review_title: Great game, but it needs more features
reviews.review_description:
Dinosaur engineer is a great game I understand that this is a early access game, which is shown by the app lab label. This game has consistent gameplay. The neon filter on everything looks great. I consider this a unique game

Though I feel that this game is very short. And like any other game, it could have its problems and heavily asked suggestions.

A suggestion is to add a mode of multiplayer that lets you become a dinosaur and fight with other people. With the small this game will stand out a little more and probably get popular as games like super shot.

Another suggestion is to make another mode that allows you to create your own dinosaur. This feature can be supported like a mod. people can download uploaded fanmade dinosaurs. these dinosaurs can be added to the main game and given their own thumbnail by the player for dino lab. yes, if you can add it to the game, the previous mode suggestion could be compatible with dinosaur with this new feature if you choose to add these things.

But anyways, I look forward for this game to grow more as much as it can. for you other guys reading this review. I hope it helped you. I respect you guys.

 
Could you also add actual guns to the game?🤞🏻

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate your enthusiasm and suggestions for Dinosaur Engineer.

We are currently developing the game in innovative directions, utilizing AI and other advanced technologies. As a solo developer, I am facing many technical challenges, which may cause some delays. However, I am committed to making Dinosaur Engineer the best dinosaur toy experience in the XR world.

Your suggestions for multiplayer mode and custom dinosaur creation are fantastic and provide valuable insight into what our community desires. While I cannot make any promises at this time, I will certainly take these ideas into consideration for future updates. Adding actual guns is also an interesting idea that I will look into.

Thank you again for your support and patience. We are excited to see how Dinosaur Engineer will evolve and grow with your valuable input.

reviews.review_description:
I cannot even type this review without smiling.  While it took a bit getting used to teleporting and changing my weapons, I had such a fun experience in this game.  

This is gonna be a hit for all ages.  Because if you're gonna box in a ring, battle in an arena, or paint some beautiful artwork alongside classical music, why not do it with a dinosaur?!

This game was definitely made by dinosaur enthusiasts for dinosaur enthusiasts.  It is a well-rounded game and gives you some of the best VR has to offer.

developer_response.body:
🦕 Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying 'Dinosaur Engineer' and embracing the VR experience. 🌟

Teleporting and weapon changing in VR can take some getting used to, but we're glad you're having fun with it. We aimed to make this game enjoyable for all ages, and it's heartwarming to see we've hit the mark!

Your acknowledgment that our game is crafted by and for dinosaur enthusiasts means the world to us. We'll keep working hard to bring you the best of VR gaming. Keep sharing your experiences - we are always values your feedback! 🌍💬

reviews.review_title: It's a Dinosaur toy box in VR.
reviews.review_description: "Dino Paint in 'Dinosaur Engineer' left me deeply impressed. The other experiences are intriguing too, and I'm excited for what's to come."
